escalation.rationale: Iran's new Supreme Leader orders continued Strait of Hormuz blockade while Israeli strikes hit central Beirut and Iranian missiles target central Israel.

ticker_items: Iran's new Supreme Leader vows to keep Strait of Hormuz closed
Israeli airstrikes hit central Beirut near government headquarters
Iranian missile strike sets building ablaze in central Israel
Oil surges over $100 as Strait of Hormuz remains blocked
Over 1,100 children killed or injured since Iran war began

middle_east.description: Israeli airstrikes hit two buildings near Lebanese government headquarters
Iranian missile strike sets building ablaze in central Israel
Iran attacks two oil tankers in Persian Gulf as part of economic warfare

claimed_totals.claim: Total casualties in US-Israel Iran war
Children killed or injured since Iran war started

middle_east.text: Israel 'stronger than ever' in first speech since Iran war
middle_east.speaker: Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Prime Minister

middle_east.text: We will avenge the blood of our martyrs
middle_east.speaker: Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei
middle_east.title: Supreme Leader

observers.description: President vetoes participation in EU's defence spending loan scheme. Prime Minister calls extraordinary cabinet meeting in response. Growing tensions over EU defense integration amid regional conflicts.
Energy playbook paying off amid global turmoil as energy markets enter unprecedented crisis. Positioning as alternative supplier while largest producers face disruptions.
Foreign Minister warns Europe was like 'old fat lazy cat' after Cold War. Vows NATO forces will strike 'into the heart of Russia' if Moscow invades Baltic countries.

financial.notes: Oil surges over $100 as US admits inability to control Strait of Hormuz with analysts calling it largest oil disruption ever.

update_log.text: Iranian missile strike sets building ablaze in central Israel
Israeli airstrikes hit central Beirut near government headquarters
Iran's new Supreme Leader calls for Strait of Hormuz to remain shut
Drone attack on market in Sudan kills 11 civilians
